title: Fish Anywhere
description: Fish anywhere, without restrictions. Useful for modded liquids or non-open water.
body:
# Fish Anywhere

Fish anywhere, without restrictions. Useful for modded liquids or non-open water.

![Non-open water.](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbGpjczRjbGpmdG11aHZheW1wZG9qZ2t2emYycTQ4MjBsdnZlZmZpciZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/1ReCBK3skm2SLoWkl2/source.gif)
![Lava.](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbndoYW8zYmI2ejNzcnZwN29tODFxcnI5cmpkMmxxMDZodXJoMmo3ZSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/vczmfPfJw51o1Vg1Qb/source.gif)
